query:
DELETE cr FROM candidate_results cr
INNER JOIN candidate_results cr2 
  ON cr.candidatoSequencial = cr2.candidatoSequencial 
  AND cr.uf = cr2.uf 
  AND cr.ano = cr2.ano 
  AND cr.turno = cr2.turno
  AND cr.id > cr2.id;
